name: Chocolate Creme Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart heavy saucepan, combine evaporated milk, sugar, salt, and butter.
2. Bring to a rolling boil over medium-low heat, stirring constantly.
3. Cook until the mixture reaches a soft ball stage (about 235°F on an instant-read thermometer), stirring frequently.
4. Remove from heat and stir in chocolate chips until melted.
5. Quickly add marshmallow creme, vanilla, and nuts, then stir until well combined.
6. Pour the mixture into a buttered 8-inch square pan and spread to form an even layer.
7. Cover with plastic wrap and chill until firm (about 2 hours).
8. Cut into squares and serve. Store in the refrigerator for up to 2 weeks. Makes approximately 2 pounds.
